name: clara-jonas-clara-roundtrip
description: Smoke test for Clara routing to Jonas, Jonas qualifying a lead scenario, and Jonas returning the caller to Clara cleanly.

userTurns.label: Lead qualification scenario
userTurns.text: Jonas, qualify a plumbing company with six vans that needs faster lead triage and wants to launch within a month.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Receptionist follow-up
userTurns.text: Clara, stay with me and show the receptionist demo.
